ResearchProjectDef.label: circle stabilizer frames
ResearchProjectDef.description: Formalizes the first edge-mounted restraint blocks for the abyssal summoning circle. This does not make the breach safe; it simply gives the platform a way to begin resisting its own geometry.

ResearchProjectDef.label: resonant lattice stabilization
ResearchProjectDef.description: Moves beyond brute-force clamps and into tuned infernal routing. Resonant stabilizers reduce the circle's tendency to shove excess ritual pressure outward as waste and contamination.

ResearchProjectDef.label: crown containment architecture
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develops elite crown-tier restraint geometry for ritual infrastructure expected to survive repeated high-threat invoke patterns. These modules are no longer just clamps; they are active shape-imposition engines.
